zh.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäfer是Michel Schäffer的兒子，於大約1616年出生在巴登奧拉赤 普福海姆聶費。他於1640年11月15日與Anna Fiseles在巴登奧拉赤 普福海姆聶費結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1653年2月23日在他的家鄉享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäfer是Michel Schäffer的儿子，于大约1616年出生在巴登奧拉赤 普福海姆聶費。他于1640年11月15日与Anna Fiseles在巴登奧拉赤 普福海姆聶費结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1653年2月23日在他的家乡享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Schäfer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pastor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Jose, Luis, Mario, Fernando, Mariano, Pedro, Ricardo, Santiago, Sergio, Alfonso.

English, French, Portuguese, Galician, Spanish, and Catalan: occupational name for a shepherd, Anglo-Norman French pastre (oblique case pastour), Old French, Portuguese, Galician, Spanish, and Catalan pastor ‘shepherd’, from Latin pastor, an agent derivative of pascere ‘to graze’. The religious sense of a spiritual leader was rare in the Middle Ages; it is unlikely, therefore, that this sense lies behind any examples of the surname.
German and Dutch: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of German Schäfer (see Schafer ) or any other surname meaning ‘shepherd’. Compare Pastorius .

variants.name: Pastorius
meanings: German: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of Schäfer (see Schafer ) or any other surname meaning ‘shepherd’. Compare Pastor . This surname is not found in Germany, anymore.

History: Franz (Francis) Daniel Pastorius (1651–1719), from Sommershausen near Frankfurt, Germany, was the leader of a group of Mennonites who arrived in Philadelphia, PA, in 1683, one of the earliest German-speaking groups of immigrants to North America. Under his leadership plans were made for the city of Germantown, PA, of which he became mayor in 1691. He was one of the signers of the first Quaker protest against slavery in America.

variants.name: Schaefer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Ernst, Hans, Gerhard, Helmut, Dieter, Wolfgang, Hermann, Horst, Manfred.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (Schäfer): occupational name for a shepherd, from an agent derivative of German Schaf, Middle High German schāf ‘sheep’. It is also found in Hungary and Czechia. Compare Schafer and Schaffer 2.

nameMeanings.name: Hans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Jacob
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

en.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäfer was born about 1616, in Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden as the son of Michel Schäffer. He married Anna Fiseles on 15 November 1640, in Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 February 1653, in his hometown, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäfer est né environ 1616, à Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden, fils de Michel Schäffer. Il a épousé Anna Fiseles le 15 novembre 1640, à Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 février 1653, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäfer wurde um 1616 in Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden, als Sohn von Michel Schäffer geboren. Er hat am 15. November 1640 in Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden Anna Fiseles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Februar 1653 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäfer è nato il circa 1616 nel Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden come figlio di Michel Schäffer. Lui sposato Anna Fiseles il 15 novembre 1640, nel Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 febbraio 1653, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäferは約1616年にバデンオバーアムト プフォーズヘイムニーフエルンでMichel Schäfferの息子として生まれた。1640年11月15日にバデンオバーアムト プフォーズヘイムニーフエルンでAnna Fiselesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1653年2月23日に故郷で38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäfer(은)는 대략 1616년 바든 오베램트 p포즈하임 니퍼에서 Michel Schäffer의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1640년 11월 15일 바든 오베램트 p포즈하임 니퍼에서 Anna Fiseles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1653년 2월 23일 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäfer nasceu aproximadamente 1616, em Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden filho de Michel Schäffer. Ele casou-se com Anna Fiseles em 15 de novembro de 1640, em Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1653, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäfer родился около 1616 г. в местности ниефирн, обирамт пфоржим, баден. Его отца звали Michel Schäffer. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Fiseles 15 ноября 1640 г. в местности ниефирн, обирамт пфоржим, баден. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 февраля 1653 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Schäfer nació aproximadamente 1616, en Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden como hijo de Michel Schäffer. Se casó con Anna Fiseles el 15 de noviembre de 1640, en Niefern, Oberamt Pforzheim, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de febrero de 1653, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años.
